name: smartpark
description: SmartPark - Run both frontend and backend with one command

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix smartpark-backend && npm install --prefix smartpark-frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run dev --prefix smartpark-backend" "npm start --prefix smartpark-frontend"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run install:all && npm run seed
